fixtureDescription: Emoji-heavy social media post about a shopping day
passage: OMG 😱😱 just had the BEST day ever!! 🎉🎊 Went shopping with my bestie 👯‍♀️ and found the cutest shoes 👟✨ at the mall 🏬 Then we grabbed lunch 🍕🍔 at this amazing new restaurant 🍽️ The food was absolutely incredible 🤤💯 Can't wait to go back next weekend!! 😍🙌 #blessed #bestdayever #foodie 🥰

items.definition: an expression meaning the most enjoyable day one has experienced
used to express excitement or eagerness about something upcoming
to return to a place one has visited before
the activity of visiting shops to buy things
most attractive or charming in an endearing way (informal superlative)
coverings for the feet, typically made of leather or other material
a meal eaten in the middle of the day
causing great surprise or wonder; wonderful
a place where people pay to sit and eat meals
Saturday and Sunday, the days when most people do not work
fortunate and happy (used to express gratitude, often on social media)
a person with a keen interest in food and eating
